§6Ducts Overview§f

§aTransfer RF power, fluids, items, and players between machines through tiered pipe networks!§f

The §bThermal Dynamics§f mod adds a family of pipes called §bducts§f that carry §6Redstone Flux§f, fluids, items, and even players across your base. All ducts connect adjacently and can be configured with a §bCrescent Hammer§f (wrench) — §9right-click§f a connection to disconnect, §9shift-right-click§f to pick up.

§6Duct Types§f:
§b• Fluxducts§f — Transfer RF power between machines.
§b• Fluiducts§f — Transfer fluids between tanks and machines.
§b• Itemducts§f — Transfer items between inventories.
§b• Viaducts§f — Transport players between locations.
§b• Structuralducts§f — Decorative; connects to other ducts, used for covers.

Each duct type has multiple tiers. Start with §bLeadstone Fluxduct§f and §bFluiduct§f — both craftable with basic metals.

§eTip§f: Ducts are not just transport — higher tiers unlock vacuum routing, impulse speed boosts, and player teleportation. Plan your trunk lines around the tier you need, not the tier you start with.
